summary: First-iteration full-stack testing of 3 new student pages (Ride History, Profile, Need Help). 17/17 backend pytest tests passed and all critical frontend flows verified end-to-end via Playwright. Auth guard, summary cards, table filtering/sorting/search, modal open/close, profile edit, change password (wrong + success + revert), logout, FAQ accordion + search + category filter, ticket submission + list refresh, navigation links and visual consistency all work. No critical issues found.

issues: In-browser Babel transformer is used (console warning) — fine for dev, recommend pre-compiling for production

critical_code_review_comments: Backend uses inline requireUser middleware copy-pasted across profile.js, support.js and bookings.js — DRY violation; consider extracting to /backend/middleware/requireUser.js
JWT_SECRET fallback string 'change-me-to-a-long-random-string' is hardcoded in 3 files — confirm .env JWT_SECRET is set in production and remove the fallback to fail fast
support.js FAQ list is hard-coded inline (10 items) — fine for MVP, but moving to DB would allow admin editing
PATCH /api/profile uses string concatenation to build SQL field list — parameterized correctly but readability could improve with a small helper
Frontend HTML pages rely on Babel-standalone (in-browser transpile) — slow first load; recommend a build step for production
test_credentials: priya.student@uni.edu.au / TestPass123! (reset to original at end of password-change test)
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test support tickets via API/UI flow (prefixed TEST_); did not delete since support_tickets has no DELETE endpoint exposed and they don't affect other tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new student pages are fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_student_new_pages.py cover profile (GET/PATCH/change-password), support (FAQ/tickets GET+POST), and bookings/history (filters + sort + auth). For UI re-test: login via API POST /api/auth/login then localStorage.setItem('cbs_token', token) before navigating. Password change test correctly reverts password to TestPass123! at the end. Test created TEST_-prefixed support tickets which are now in DB for priya.student.

detailed_results.auth_guard: PASS — visiting /frontend/Student/Student_ride_history.html without cbs_token redirects to /login.html

ride_history.summary_cards: PASS — 2 Total Rides, 7 km Distance, 1.5 kg CO2, $15.00 Total Spend
ride_history.search_filter: PASS — 'BIKE-001' narrows to 1 row, clear restores 3
ride_history.status_filter: PASS — completed→2 rows, cancelled→1 row, all→3
ride_history.sort_toggle: PASS — newest first (#19) vs oldest first (#17)
ride_history.view_modal: PASS — opens with ride details, closes with close-ride-detail-btn

profile.load: PASS — Priya Kumar / STU-000007 / Total 3 / Completed 2 / Active 0 / 3 recent activity rows
profile.edit: PASS — full_name updated via PATCH then reverted
profile.change_password_wrong: PASS — backend returns 401, modal shows .err message after submission
profile.change_password_correct: PASS — TestPass123! → NewPass456! works and was reverted
profile.logout: PASS — clears cbs_token from localStorage and lands on /login.html

need_help.category_filter: PASS — Booking category filters to 2 FAQs
need_help.submit_disabled_no_category: PASS — ticket-submit is disabled until category is picked
need_help.submit_ticket: PASS — POST /api/support/tickets returns 201 and My Tickets list refreshes with new ticket

navigation.topnav_links: PASS — Home, My Bookings, Ride History, Help links resolved
navigation.sidebar: PASS — visible on all 3 pages with home/calendar/bike/user/help icons

detailed_results.visual_consistency: PASS — all 3 pages use shared student-shared.css (white cards on light grey, green #22C55E primary, blue accents, Inter/Plus Jakarta Sans, left sidebar + top navbar). Layout matches Student_dashboard.html design exactly.
